title: lab11
text:
Clara’s Website
Welcome to my lab 11 website for BIOSTAT 620!

title: About
text:
I am Clara and I am a first year master of Health Data Science student at the University of Michigan! In my free time I enjoy knitting. 
I also love to be outdoors, hike, try good new foods and travel (especially when I can do all at once) 
I am a pretty avid runner. I am “training” for my fourth marathon that is coming up at the beginning of May in Prague. However, I am currently dealing with injury so my running is on pause. My most recent marathon was in Ann Arbor (see how I did here)
